name: Shared Type Contract Boundary Unit

input.name: requestDTOs
input.type: CreateDeckRequest | AddSlideRequest | ImportMarkdownRequest | GenerateDeckRequest | GenerateDeckFromOutlineRequest | ExportDeckRequest

validate.v1: Server route payloads should map to shared request/response interfaces
validate.v2: PermissionRole and collaborator/session types must remain cross-module compatible
validate.v3: Public exports are re-exported through shared/src/index.ts

constraints: Schema evolution requires coordinated changes across server and web consumers
Breaking field changes impact API and websocket payload compatibility
description: Defines the canonical shared interface boundary consumed by server routes/services and web client integrations.
